info.title: MPC Wallet API
info.description: Threshold MPC wallet REST API. No single party ever holds a complete private key.

post.description:
This endpoint is behind auth + HMAC middleware (protected route).
Only admin role can revoke keys.

get.description:
NOTE: In a production system this would load the wallet's group public key
from the key store and derive the chain-specific address. This stub returns
a placeholder demonstrating the routing.

post.summary: `POST /v1/wallets` — create a new MPC wallet (distributed keygen).

get.summary: `GET /v1/wallets/:id` — get wallet details with derived addresses.

post.summary:
`POST /v1/wallets/:id/transactions` — build + sign + broadcast.
Requires: Initiator or Admin + risk tier check

AddressEntry.description: A chain-specific address derived from the wallet's group public key.

data.description: Server's response with ephemeral key and challenge.
Response for wallet details with addresses.

AuthVerifyRequest.description: Request for `/v1/auth/verify` — uses `#[serde(flatten)]` to embed ClientAuth.

ChainInfo.description: Single chain info in the chains list.

client_ephemeral_pubkey.description: Client's ephemeral X25519 public key (32 bytes, hex-encoded).

client_key_id.description: Client's static public key ID (first 8 bytes of Ed25519 pubkey, hex).

CreateWalletRequest.description: Request body for `POST /v1/wallets` — create a new MPC wallet.

ErrorBody.description: Structured error body in JSON responses.

ErrorCode.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic client handling.

ReadinessResponse.description: Readiness probe response with component health.

ServerHello.description: Server's response with ephemeral key and challenge.

SignRequest.description: Request body for `POST /v1/wallets/:id/sign` — sign a message.

TransactionRequest.description: Request body for `POST /v1/wallets/:id/transactions` — build + sign + broadcast.

data.description: Optional calldata (hex-encoded, for smart contract calls).

value.description: Value as string (chain-native denomination, e.g. wei for EVM).

WalletDetailResponse.description: Response for wallet details with addresses.
